items.text: When disconnecting cables, always do so from the minus (-) terminal.
When disconnecting cables, always do so from the minus (-) terminal.
Some systems lose stored memory by disconnecting the cable.
Some systems lose stored memory by disconnecting the cable.

blocks.text: Disconnect the cable (A) from the negative (-) terminal of the 12V battery. Remove the terminal cover (D). Disconnect the cable (E) from the positive (+) terminal of the 12V battery.

items: The cable must be disconnected from the 12V battery sensor (B).
12V battery Do not disconnect the cable from the 12V battery sensor except to replace the sensor.
To prevent breakage, do not hold the connector part (C) and do not perform the detachment operation.

items.text: If 12V battery power is cancelled, the next item does not need to be learned.
If 12V battery power is cancelled, the next item does not need to be learned.
If the 12V battery and cable terminals are dirty, clean them with a wire brush or sandpaper before installation.
If the 12V battery and cable terminals are dirty, clean them with a wire brush or sandpaper before installation.
When connecting cables, always do so from the positive (+) terminal.
When connecting cables, always do so from the positive (+) terminal.
Be careful not to overtighten the terminals as this may damage the fasteners.
Be careful not to overtighten the terminals as this may damage the fasteners.

blocks.text: Apply grease to the 12V battery terminals. Connect cable (A) to the positive (+) terminal of the 12V battery, then connect cable (B) to the negative (-) terminal of the 12V battery. Install the terminal cover (D).

items: To prevent breakage, do not hold the connector part (C) and do not perform the detachment operation.
